description:
As an artist
  I want to be able to create an account and log in
  So that I can access my personalized space on StageComplete

steps.name: I click on "Créer mon profil d'artiste"
I fill the registration form with valid data
I should be redirected to the artist dashboard
I should see the artist name displayed
an artist exists with email "existing@stagecomplete.fr" and password "TestPass123!"
I go to the login page
I should be redirected to the artist dashboard
I go to the login page
I should see an error "Identifiants invalides"
I should remain on the login page
I am logged in as an artist
I should still be logged in
I should see my artist dashboard

result.error_message: Timed out retrying after 10000ms: Expected to find content: 'Bienvenue' but never did.

steps.name: I am logged in as an artist
I should be redirected to the homepage

name: Artist Authentication
